headline: Are Humana’s (HUM) Executive Severance Defenses Undercutting Its Patient-Centric Investment Story?
summary: Recently, Humana Inc. received a shareholder proposal from activist John Chevedden seeking shareholder approval for executive severance packages above 2.99 times salary and target bonus, which the board has urged investors to vote against at the April 16, 2026 annual meeting. At the same time, Humana has been expanding member-focused benefits, such as broader access to continuous glucose monitors for Medicare Advantage enrollees, underscoring a growing tension between executive pay practices...
